Bachelor of Technology in Computer Science in AIML, CGPA:8.68 Pune, Maharashtra
Experience
SailPoint Jul 2025 – Present
Software Engineer Intern Pune, Maharashtra
• Built 10+ Tier-2 production SaaS connectors using standardized REST APIs, OAuth-based authentication,
and Added Credential Provider.
• Delivered Express Setup and 8+ i18n enhancements across Tier-3 connectors, accelerating onboarding and
localization readiness.
• Fixed 3 production bugs, including 2 security issues, by upgrading dependencies and addressing placeholder-related
defects.
GenAI Initiatives
• Designed a Multi-agent CLI using the OpenAI Agents SDK with structured Prompt Engineering to
auto-generate IAM connector documentation from JSON specifications.
• Orchestrated 5 specialized LLM agents via a centralized Runner, leveraging prompt templates to modularize
schema parsing, permission modeling, authentication logic extraction, and markdown generation.
• Built a GenAI-powered evaluation repository using a multi-agent Excel ingestion pipeline to enable system
feasibility analysis and traceability across SaaS integrations.
Projects
AskYourPDF | Next.js, Clerk, Express.js, BullMQ, Redis, LangChain, Qdrant May 2025
∗ Built a PDF question-answering system using Next.js, Express.js, and Clerk, supporting secure document uploads and
semantic search over user documents.
∗ Implemented an asynchronous document ingestion and embedding pipeline with BullMQ, Redis, and LangChain,
generating vector embeddings via Gemini 1.5 Flash.
∗ Integrated Qdrant as a vector database to enable efficient retrieval for RAG-based question answering.
Technical Skills
Languages: JavaScript (Node.js), TypeScript, Python, SQL, HTML/CSS
Developer Tools: Docker, Git, GitHub, AWS, Postman
Technologies/Frameworks: Node.js, Express.js, FastAPI, Next.js, OpenAI Agents SDK, LangChain, RESTful APIs,
OAuth 2.0, BullMQ, Redis, CLI Tooling, Prompt Engineering, RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation)
Databases/Storage: MongoDB, PostgreSQL, Qdrant (Vector Database)
Certifications
IBM DevOps Capstone
Deep Learning Specialization
0-1 Full Stack Web Development Course
IBM DevOps and Software Engineering
Extra-Curricular Activities
Studied and documented GenAI fundamentals alongside internship work, authoring 8+ technical blogs on LLMs,
tokenization, vector embeddings, system prompting, chain-of-thought reasoning, agentic AI, and RAG failure
modes. Blogs published on Hashnode (vedank.hashnode.dev).

jobs.title: Software Engineer Intern
jobs.jd_text:
Software Engineer Intern (Java)
Job Overview
We are looking for a motivated and detail-oriented Software Engineer Intern to join our development team. This role is designed for a student or recent graduate eager to apply their Java knowledge to real-world applications, contribute to scalable backend systems, and learn the full software development lifecycle (SDLC) in a professional environment.

Key Responsibilities
Feature Development: Assist in designing, coding, and testing new features for our core Java-based applications.

Bug Fixing: Debug existing codebases and resolve technical issues to ensure high performance and reliability.

Code Reviews: Participate in peer code reviews to maintain high coding standards and learn best practices.

Collaboration: Work closely with senior engineers, product managers, and QA teams to understand requirements and deliver technical solutions.

Documentation: Maintain clear and concise technical documentation for APIs and system architectures.

Required Skills & Qualifications
Core Java: Strong understanding of Java fundamentals (OOPs concepts, Collections, Multithreading, and Exception Handling).

Frameworks: Familiarity with Java frameworks such as Spring Boot or Hibernate is a significant plus.

Databases: Basic knowledge of SQL (PostgreSQL/MySQL) and understanding of relational database design.

Tools: Experience with Version Control Systems, specifically Git.

Problem Solving: Solid understanding of Data Structures and Algorithms (DSA).

Education: Currently pursuing or recently completed a B.E./B.Tech/M.Tech in Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related field.

Preferred Skills (Bonus)
Familiarity with RESTful APIs and Microservices architecture.

Basic understanding of build tools like Maven or Gradle.

Knowledge of cloud platforms (AWS/Azure/GCP) or containerization (Docker/Kubernetes).

Experience with unit testing frameworks like JUnit or Mockito.

Why Join Us?
Mentorship: Work directly with experienced engineers who are committed to your professional growth.

Impact: Contribute to live projects used by real customers.

Culture: A collaborative, inclusive, and fast-paced environment that values innovation and curiosity.
